title: PulseClick
description: PulseClick is a simple and lightweight autoclicker for Minecraft.
body:
![Pulse Click](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e89fb398ea17b3f45141d05b8fbad5394a6eaf9d.png)

Pulse Click is a simple and lightweight autoclicker for Minecraft. It is easy to use and has a lot of features (e.g. starvation prevention) designed to make AFK farming efficient and safe.

# Features
- Left and Right Click
- "Respect Attack Cooldown" Mode
- "Tick" Mode
- Prevents stravation by automatically disabling the autoclicker when below 2 hunger bars (if enabled)
- Prevents tools breaking by automatically disabling the autoclicker when below 10 durability (if enabled)
- Prevents death by automatically disconnecting the player when below 2 hearts (if enabled)
- Ingame Config accessible via keybind (default J)
- Hotkey for activation / deactivation (default F6)

# Support
For support add me on Discord using "Skytendo06" or create an issue on github.
